blended.narrative: Welch Village is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 7,783 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 54°F.

Sunday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
